---
title: "Hideo Ishima"
---

This is Hideo Ishima's website. ![Profile Picture](pictures/profile.jpg)




## About Me

Hideo ISHIMA is an associate professor of political science at Kyoto University. 

I'm on leave for the academic year 2025-26, visiting at the University of Michigan.

Address: Graduate School of Law, Kyoto University, Yoshida-Honmachi, Sakyo-ku, Kyoto. 606-8501

mail:  ishima.hideo.3r [at] kyoto-u.ac.jp

[Google Scholar Profile](https://scholar.google.co.jp/citations?user=8bQKmPMAAAAJ&hl=en) / [ResearchGate Profile](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Hideo-Ishima) / [ORCID Profile](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-8777-1902) 


![Kyoto University](pictures/home_institution.jpg)
